title: Lovely
subTitle: Mahadevan does not believe in love and hates the word, but his daughter Nivedha loves Chandru. In order to get his consent, the couple comes up with an intricate plan and executes it.

title: Sigappu Rojakkal
subTitle: A young man, traumatised by his past, grows up to despise the opposite sex and exploits them. However, things take a turn when he falls in love with a woman prisoner while in jail.

title: April Maadhathil
subTitle: Kathir, a poor young man, and Shweta, a rich young girl, meet in college and fall in love. However, they are unable to confess their feelings to each other.

title: Bhakthi Neram
subTitle: Bhakthi Neram

title: Anna Nagar Mudhal Theru
subTitle: Sivaraman, a desperate unemployed youth, disguises himself as a Gorkha and takes up the job of a watchman. However, he is surprised when his childhood sweetheart moves into the colony he works in.

title: Dharma Durai
subTitle: Dharmadurai, a heartbroken doctor, turns to alcohol and becomes the source of embarrassment for his family. However, a meeting with an old friend changes his life for good.

title: Manathai Thirudi Vittai
subTitle: Deva, a student from a music school, falls in love with his classmate, Shruti, and decides to marry her. However, when he remembers a mistake he made in the past, he faces a predicament.

title: Gentleman
subTitle: Kicha is a modern-day Robin Hood, who along with his friend, Mani, steals from the rich to aid the poor. In society, he is a respected man who runs a small business.

title: Vaanathaipola
subTitle: An older brother dedicates himself to his three younger brothers' success. As a result, he puts their needs first, making personal sacrifices to provide opportunities and support.

title: Annamalai
subTitle: Annamalai, a milkman, and Ashok, the son of a rich businessman, are childhood friends. However Ashok's father disapproves of their friendship and attempts to create a rift between the two.

title: Thiruda Thirudi
subTitle: Vasu, a youngster, is considered irresponsible by the woman he loves and his family. In order to gain their approval, he decides to mend his ways and prove his worth.

title: Thiruda Thirudi
subTitle: Vasu, a youngster, is considered irresponsible by the woman he loves and his family. In order to gain their approval, he decides to mend his ways and prove his worth.

title: Galatta Kalyanam
subTitle: In order to marry Lalitha, Madhan sets out to find suitable bachelors for her three beautiful sisters as part of a condition set by her father.

title: Aai
subTitle: A young girl is forced to give up her studies and join a dance troupe after her mother's untimely death. She soon falls in love with a renowned doctor while being treated by him.

title: Bhakthi Neram
subTitle: Bhakthi Neram

title: Mannan
subTitle: Krishnan's boss, Shanti, is an autocratic, domineering woman whom he constantly defies. Irked and revengeful, she manipulates his mother who has paralysis and marries him in a bid to control him.

title: Thavasi
subTitle: Thavasi is a revered landlord who lives in a small village. However, his life changes drastically when a young man commits suicide due to a misjudgement he makes.

title: Pandavar Bhoomi
subTitle: Dhanasekar hires an engineer, to rebuild his ancestral house. When he falls in love with Dhanasekar's niece, Dhanasekar narrates his family's past, which changes his mind to sacrifice his love.

title: Aalukkoru Aasai
subTitle: Arivazhagan plans on leading a happy life by choosing an independent educated girl as his partner. However, his orthodox grandparents trick him into marrying an illiterate woman.

title: Pudhukottayilirundhu Saravanan
subTitle: Stranded in Singapore after losing his passport, Saravanan undertakes a risky job in exchange for a substantial sum of money.

title: Manmadhan
subTitle: Mythili meets Madhan and feels instantly drawn towards him. However, she is gripped by fear when she realises that he eerily resembles a serial killer from her recurring nightmare.

title: Coimbatore Mappillai
subTitle: When Balu moves to the city in search of career opportunities, he falls in love with Sumithra. However, Sumithra's evil cousin, Mahesh, creates a rift between their blooming love.

title: Chinna Gounder
subTitle: The village head is a man who sticks to honesty while making judgements. However, when he falls prey to a conspiracy, he bravely fights to ensure that justice prevails in his village.
